articles.title: XRP, Cardano (ADA) and Solana (SOL) See Institutional Capital Flows As Altcoin Sentiment Brightens: CoinShares
articles.description: Digital assets manager CoinShares says institutional investors are becoming more optimistic on altcoins despite Bitcoin (BTC) and the overall markets suffering outflows for the second week in a row. articles.description: The volatility has risen again in the XRP price, which has recently soared with a partial victory over the SEC. Continue Reading: Ripple (XRP) Price Experiencing Major Volatility! Here is the Reason

articles.title: DeSantis Accuses Biden of 'War on Bitcoin,' Vows to Stop It if Elected President
articles.description: Presidential candidate and Florida Governor Ron DeSantis (R-Fla.) called out the Biden Administration for its “war” on bitcoin and cryptocurrencies and said that he will end it should he become President.

articles.title: Breaking: HEX Token Plummets 25% Following SEC Lawsuit Against Founder Richard Heart
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filed a lawsuit against Richard “Heart” Schueler and crypto projects HEX, PULSECHAIN, and PULSEX. According to a document filed with a court for the Eastern District of New York and shared on X by economist Alex Krüeger, the regulator is violating U.S. securities laws. Related Reading: Is Another Bitcoin Rally Coming Soon? This Pattern May Say So As of this writing, HEX is feeling the heat from the lawsuit. The token plummeted over 11% in today’s

articles.title: SEC Push to Delist Cryptocurrencies Except Bitcoin Could End Crypto: Coinbase CEO
articles.description: Brian Armstrong, CEO of cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase, disclosed in a July 31 interview with the Financial Times that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) wanted the company to delist almost all cryptocurrencies, leaving only Bitcoin:And, we said, well how are you coming to that conclusion, because thats not our interpretation of the law. articles.title: XRP To Skyrocket To $500 Within 7 Months, Predicts Wells Fargo Treasury Manager
articles.description: In a recent statement, Wells Fargo’s Treasury Management officer Shannon Thorp provided an eye-catching price prediction for XRP. The forward-thinking executive anticipates a potential surge in XRP’s value to anywhere between $100 and $500 in the short term, specifically within the next 4 to 7 months. This price hike prediction represents an astounding 14,200 % to 71,400% increase from the...

articles.title: SEC Wanted Coinbase to Delist Shiba Inu (SHIB), Cardano (ADA), and Other Altcoins
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reportedly sought to restrict Coinbase's trading to only Bitcoin, according to CEO Brian Armstrong

articles.title: SEC Told Coinbase to Stop Trading in all Cryptos Except Bitcoin Before Suing: FT
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) had asked Coinbase (COIN) to stop trading in all cryptocurrencies other than bitcoin (BTC) prior to suing the crypto exchange, according to a Financial Times report.
